title: more equipments
description: adds 39 new armors and tools, including a powerful blade of creation
body:
# contents
Details are seen in additional file "details".(download in additional link(provided later,the website is still in development))
## items
### what is added?
This neoforge mod adds:
1. 39 different armor and tools.(we even plan to make armor and tools for every item in vanilla minecraft!)
![armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ad705ad4beee00e44b24a5c614282e4859ede75.png)
display of all armor
2. 2 new tools: "the blade of creation"(see gallery) and "horn".
![intuitive display of the damage of "the blade of creation"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/310d9808250e1fcefb22801aa0b2118fe3c26108_0.webp)
intuitive display of the damage of "the blade of creation"

### usage?
1. armor made with planks can increase logging speed.(Unsupported in 1.0.0)
2. tools made with stone types/ores can increase mining speed.(Unsupported in 1.0.0)
3. armor made with food can  increase food level, tools made with food can be eaten.(Unsupported in 1.0.0)
3. "horn" can summon 25 iron golems at a time using right click, click on ground to kill all iron golems.
!["horn" in action](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a3abd6dd542aac668e7554740863b1813134b00_0.webp)
"horn" in action
4. "the blade of creation" has an attack damage of 99999(see gallery) and kills entities within spawn radius with right click(see gallery)
!["the blade of creation" in action](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc872f28ce322f4ee1dad14731f72343d02844ca_0.webp)
"the blade of creation" in action
## entities
### what is added?
This mod adds 5 powerful bosses for you to challenge.(Unsupported in 1.0.0)
### usage?
You can get lots of loot by beating these bosses.(Unsupported in 1.0.0)
# critical information
This mod does not cause game crashes and world corruption.
# versions
This mod is currently supported in neoforge 1.21.1.
# credits
This mod is made by the block creation team using modmaker mcreator.
